body:
## What
Rename all in-codebase references from `nagli` to `naglity` across 5 files: `package.json`, `README.md`, `apps/web/app/layout.tsx`, `apps/web/lib/auth.ts`, and `apps/api/prisma/seed.ts`.

## Why
The GitHub repository was renamed from `naglii/nagli` to `naglii/naglity`, but the codebase still contained the old name in the monorepo root package name, browser tab title, localStorage key, seed admin email, and README heading — causing inconsistency between the repo identity and the app itself.

## How
- `package.json` — updated monorepo `name` field
- `README.md` — updated heading
- `layout.tsx` — updated browser tab title to `Naglity — Crane Truck Logistics`
- `auth.ts` — renamed localStorage key from `nagli_user` to `naglity_user` (existing sessions will require a fresh login)
- `seed.ts` — updated seeded admin email to `admin@naglity.com`
